args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%systemisch%' OR LOWER(title) LIKE '%bled%' OR (artist LIKE '%Stüngö%' OR artist LIKE '%Stungö%' OR artist LIKE '%Stuengo%') LIMIT 20;
